narrative:
07 court of appeals district has 345,037 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.4% D−R vs +12.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
